main_thread_decision_basis: The r189 Web image is running on the real APISIX route. Windows Chrome rendered the map, trend and graph as ECharts canvases, synchronized destination selection, persisted and read back the audit action, and passed runtime and business visual gates. The current exfiltration API has no rows, so the page visibly uses its documented typed simulated mode rather than claiming live data.

browser.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/150.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

data_contract.fallback: typed simulated values are used only when destination, path and session collections are empty; the page marks this state as 仿真数据（API 空）

interaction.selected_map_label: 外联目的地全球流向图，当前选中 104.16.12.34
interaction.selected_graph_label: 外联实体关联图，当前选中 104.16.12.34

independent_review.resolution: real destination and raw trend mapping, audited action, evidence freshness and stale adapter assertions were checked; r189 closes the evidence and assertion follow-up.

auxiliary_agent_review.conclusion: The r188 review found no remaining source/destination, trend or audit-action implementation defect after the r188 fix. Its evidence freshness and stale test follow-up is closed by r189.

differences.current: The live response contains zero destination, source, path and trend rows.
differences.expected: When rows arrive, `top_destinations` and `trend` are passed to the ECharts data model without synthesized categories.

reproduction_steps: Open the real APISIX route in Windows Chrome through connectOverCDP(http://127.0.0.1:9224).
Select 104.16.12.34 and confirm map and graph aria labels update together.
Submit 写入审计, then filter /api/v1/audit/logs by the returned action ID.
Compare target.png and implementation.png with tolerance 64 and mismatch threshold 0.35.
